tasks: From Model 1 (Binary partisanship) results, what is the point estimate of shared partisanship on follow-back? Give only the number rounded to three decimal places.
From Model 1 results in Fig2.pdf, what is the p-value for the interaction between shared partisanship and bot strength? Give only the number rounded to three decimal places.
From Model 1 results in Fig2.pdf, what is the FIR p-value for the interaction between shared partisanship and bot strength? Give only the number rounded to three decimal places.
